goal: Adjust the community module visual theme from the current cool blue direction to a gold-red palette that better matches the overall game tone, without changing community content, structure, or behavior.
constraints: Do not delete or rewrite any community content copy.
Keep the existing community information architecture and interaction flow intact.
Limit the change to community UI presentation and directly related task records.
Prefer palette, surface, border, and emphasis adjustments over structural rewrites.
deliverables: Retheme the community modal shell and main community views to a gold-red direction.
Update post list, detail, drafts, comments, and composer surfaces so the module feels visually consistent.
Validate that the project still builds after the UI theme changes.
